name: Super Quantal Mech Beast Magnaliger
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>量</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マグナライガー
desc:
2 Level 5 monsters
Cannot attack unless it has material. Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 monster on the field; destroy it. This is a Quick Effect if this card has "Super Quantum Red Layer" as material. Once per turn: You can attach 1 "Super Quantum" monster from your hand or field to this card as material.

This is a Quick Effect if this card has "Super Quantum Red Layer" as material. Once per turn: You can attach 1 "Super Quantum" monster from your hand or field to this card as material.

action: Attaches from your hand as Xyz Material
Attaches from your field as Xyz Material
Applies effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
